mapper.select:
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM role WHERE deleted = 0
AND (role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM role WHERE id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, parent_id, created_at, updated_at FROM permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT permission_id FROM role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_permission (role_id, permission_id, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE role_permission SET deleted = 1 WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_role (user_id, role_id, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_role SET deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
